title: tillandsia × floridana
intro: Tillandsia × floridana, also known as the Floridian airplant, is a hybrid species of Tillandsia, a type of epiphyte that absorbs moisture and nutrients through its leaves rather than its roots. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia × floridana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tillandsia × floridana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
